title: Darknut from Zelda: The Wind Waker
description: This resource pack replaces vindicators by Darknuts from Zelda: The Wind Waker.
body:
This resource pack replaces vindicators by Darknuts from Zelda: The Wind Waker.

Optifine (forge), or entity textures & models features is required (fabric)!


Custom sounds from Zelda: The Wind Waker are included
